query:
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `partners` (
  `id` int NOT NULL AUTO_INCREMENT,
  `userId` int NOT NULL,
  `referralCode` varchar(32) NOT NULL,
  `commissionRate` decimal(5,4) NOT NULL DEFAULT '0.2000',
  `tier` enum('bronze','silver','gold','platinum') NOT NULL DEFAULT 'bronze',
  `status` enum('pending','active','suspended') NOT NULL DEFAULT 'pending',
  `totalReferrals` int NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
  `totalEarnings` decimal(10,2) NOT NULL DEFAULT '0.00',
  `pendingEarnings` decimal(10,2) NOT NULL DEFAULT '0.00',
  `payoutMethod` enum('stripe','paypal','bank_transfer') NOT NULL DEFAULT 'stripe',
  `payoutEmail` varchar(320),
  `companyName` varchar(255),
  `website` varchar(512),
  `notifyReferrals` tinyint(1) NOT NULL DEFAULT 1,
  `notifyPayouts` tinyint(1) NOT NULL DEFAULT 1,
  `notifyNewsletter` tinyint(1) NOT NULL DEFAULT 1,
  `createdAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  `updatedAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  PRIMARY KEY (`id`),
  UNIQUE KEY `partners_referralCode_unique` (`referralCode`),
  KEY `partners_userId_idx` (`userId`)
);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `referrals` (
  `id` int NOT NULL AUTO_INCREMENT,
  `partnerId` int NOT NULL,
  `referredUserId` int,
  `referredShopId` int,
  `referredEmail` varchar(320),
  `referredName` varchar(255),
  `status` enum('pending','signed_up','subscribed','churned') NOT NULL DEFAULT 'pending',
  `subscriptionTier` varchar(20),
  `monthlyValue` decimal(10,2),
  `commissionEarned` decimal(10,2) NOT NULL DEFAULT '0.00',
  `convertedAt` timestamp,
  `createdAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  `updatedAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  PRIMARY KEY (`id`),
  KEY `referrals_partnerId_idx` (`partnerId`)
);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `partner_payouts` (
  `id` int NOT NULL AUTO_INCREMENT,
  `partnerId` int NOT NULL,
  `amount` decimal(10,2) NOT NULL,
  `status` enum('pending','processing','completed','failed') NOT NULL DEFAULT 'pending',
  `payoutMethod` varchar(32),
  `payoutEmail` varchar(320),
  `processedProcedure` varchar(32),
  `transactionId` varchar(255),
  `notes` text,
  `requestedAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  `processedAt` timestamp,
  `createdAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  PRIMARY KEY (`id`),
  KEY `partner_payouts_partnerId_idx` (`partnerId`)
);
